images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a sleek network switch displayed on a museum pedestal, wearing an elegant theatrical masquerade mask; behind it, half in shadow, an open equipment cabinet spills a tangle of unlabeled cables onto the floor. The polished costume up front, the undisciplined reality behind. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent on the mask's edge and one loose cable — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. No readable text, letters, or numbers anywhere. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
